creator: bhughes@freebsd.org
text:
As I commented in the original PR, I am wondering if the build fails due to the CPU not supporting all the features required by V8. You can see my original comments here:

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=233049#c2
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=233049#c3
